headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels in a 14-1 victory, with Brandon Valenzuela leading the Angels' offense. The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker and Aaron Civale contributing to the effort. The Houston Astros fell short in Cincinnati, while the Washington Nationals dropped a close game to the Miami Marlins.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left foot bone spur. San Francisco Giants right-handed pitcher Logan Webb has also been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 6, 2026, with right knee bursitis. Other notable injuries include Milwaukee Brewers left fielder Brandon Lockridge, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a right knee laceration and contusion.

The San Francisco Giants made a key trade addition, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. Other notable trades include the Philadelphia Phillies trading right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano to the Baltimore Orioles for cash, and the Athletics trading right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson to the Chicago Cubs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Rout Angels 14-1**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels in a one-sided matchup, securing a 14-1 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with a 4-hit, 1-home run performance, including 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the charge at the plate. Aaron Civale earned the win with 5 strong innings, striking out 6 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall Short in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dropped a 1-3 decision to the Cincinnati Reds, failing to secure a win on the road. Braden Shewmake led the Astros' offense with a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall Short in Miami**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a close game to the Miami Marlins, losing 8-7. Kyle Stowers led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Place Brock Stewart on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left foot bone spur. This move comes as an update to Stewart's status.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants acquired left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson in a trade with the Cleveland Guardians on May 9, 2026. Wilkinson joins the Giants in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
